_comment: Bundled Typst font endpoint example — point settings.compiler.typstFontEndpoint at scipen-wasm://typst-ts/examples/noto-cjk-sc.json to layer Noto Serif/Sans CJK SC on top of the local Latin fonts at worker init time. Binaries are pulled from jsdelivr (notofonts/noto-cjk@main) — the CDN serves them with long-lived Cache-Control so subsequent inits hit Electron's disk cache.
